hypothesis: If material synthesis procedures are extracted by the o4-mini LLM using one-shot prompting with a highly detailed in-context example, then the resulting PROV-DM graphs will achieve higher collection rates and structural/parametric F1-scores than those produced by GPT-4.1, GPT-4.1 mini, or zero-shot/simpler one-shot prompts because complex exemplars enhance in-context schema alignment and relation extraction.
